structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-12-2 PennyMac Non-QM Now Available!
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-12-02 09:36:21-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

PennyMac has long been a strong investor in the conforming and jumbo space, and they have now expanded their offerings to include non-QM products. This addition brings greater flexibility for borrowers whose scenarios fall outside standard guidelines, with their pricing being the stand-out factor when compared to our existing non-QM investors. Please read below for additional information.  

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Non-QM

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/IgCB5LNF49qgRpcIWJUCErhfAazx7iNeXGXu6scms85V42Q?e=RcFd2j> 

 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/IgDvX3m-6s36TqM04TAWo8_6ASmcDmd5sqM1N9j32Bct2qU?e=zzOwFq> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Income types permitted: 12-24 months Bank Statement, Full Doc, Asset Depletion, WVOE, DSCR
*	LTV up to 90% (conditions apply)
*	660+ FICO
*	Up to 50% DTI
*	Loan amounts up to $3MM
*	DSCR ratios >0.75 or no ratio

	*	First time investors permitted (no FTHB)

*	Eligible property types: SFR, PUD, Condos, Non-Warrantable Condos, Rural Properties (conditions apply). 
*	Short-term rentals permitted
*	Interest only and ARM options available
*	Vesting in an entity permitted

	*	Personal Guaranty is required when the Guarantor signs the note as a member or managing member of the entity. 

PRICING
